name: From Scene-Centric to Observer-Centric: Modeling Observer-Aware Relations for 3D Scene Graph Generation

description: arXiv:2606.27412v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: 3D Scene Graph Generation (3DSGG) represents 3D scenes as structured object--relation--object graphs for spatial understanding. In observer-centric spatial perception, the same scene may be expressed under different local observer frames while its structure remains unchanged. However, existing models typically assume a fixed scene-aligne...
author: Jingjun Sun, Chaowei Wang, Zhirui Liu, Jiaxu Tian, Ming Yang, Yaoxing Wang, Yan Di, Shan Gao
